description: Directory/file, DNS subdomain, virtual host, and bucket brute-forcing tool written in Go.

arguments.name: Cookies
arguments.description: Cookies to use for the requests

arguments.name: Extensions File
arguments.description: Read file extension(s) to search from the file

arguments.name: Status Codes
arguments.description: Positive status codes (overwritten with status-codes-blacklist if set)

arguments.name: Status Codes Blacklist
arguments.description: Negative status codes (will override status-codes if set)

arguments.name: No Canonicalize Headers
arguments.description: Do not canonicalize HTTP header names. If set header names are sent as-is

arguments.name: Proxy
arguments.description: Proxy to use for requests [http(s)://host:port or socks5://host:port]

arguments.name: Hide Length
arguments.description: Hide the length of the body in the output

arguments.name: Discover Backup
arguments.description: Upon finding a file search for backup files by appending multiple backup extensions

arguments.name: Exclude Length
arguments.description: Exclude the following content lengths (comma-separated, supports ranges like 203-206)

arguments.name: Force
arguments.description: Force continued operation when wildcard or prechecks fail

arguments.name: Retry Attempts
arguments.description: Times to retry on request timeout

arguments.name: Client Cert P12
arguments.description: A p12 file to use for optional TLS client certificates

arguments.name: Client Cert P12 Password
arguments.description: The password to the p12 file

arguments.name: Client Cert PEM
arguments.description: Public key in PEM format for optional TLS client certificates

arguments.name: Client Cert PEM Key
arguments.description: Private key in PEM format for optional TLS client certificates (no password)

arguments.name: Wordlist
arguments.description: Path to the wordlist. Set to - to use STDIN

arguments.name: Wordlist Offset
arguments.description: Resume from a given position in the wordlist

arguments.name: Delay
arguments.description: Time each thread waits between requests (e.g. 1500ms)

arguments.name: Output
arguments.description: Output file to write results to (defaults to stdout)

arguments.name: Quiet
arguments.description: Don't print the banner and other noise

arguments.name: Resolver
arguments.description: Use custom DNS server (format: host or host:port)

arguments.name: Show CNAME
arguments.description: Show CNAME records (cannot be used with -i)

arguments.name: Wildcard
arguments.description: Force continued operation when wildcard found

arguments.name: No FQDN
arguments.description: Disable the use of the system search domains to speed up the run

arguments.name: Wordlist
arguments.description: Path to the wordlist. Set to - to use STDIN

arguments.description: Resume from a given position in the wordlist

arguments.name: Quiet
arguments.description: Don't print the banner and other noise

arguments.name: Append Domain
arguments.description: Append main domain from URL to words from wordlist. Otherwise fully qualified domains must be in the wordlist

arguments.name: Domain
arguments.description: The domain to append when using an IP address as URL. If left empty and URL is domain-based, hostname is extracted

subcommands.name: fuzz
subcommands.description: Fuzzing mode, replaces the FUZZ keyword in URL, headers, and request body

arguments.name: Target URL
arguments.description: The target URL (must contain the FUZZ keyword)

arguments.name: Request Body
arguments.description: Request body for POST fuzzing (use FUZZ keyword for injection point)
